fields.name: Shaders
fields.definition:
00: really simple shader
01: simple shader
02: meter shader
03: text simple shader
04: meter shield shader
05: meter gradient shader
06: crosshair shader
07: directional damage
08: solid
09: sensor
10: meter single color
11: navpoints
12: medals
13: texture cam
14: meter chapter
15: meter double gradient
16: meter radial gradient
17: distortion and blur
18: emblem
19: dir damage apply
20: screen-based damage tracker

fields.name: vehicle 3d motion tracker range{3d motion tracker range}:wu
gutter range#as a percentage of radar distance
vehicle gutter range#as a percentage of radar distance
motion sensor velocity threshold (non-players):meters/second#Applies to non-player objects only (e.g. enemies).  Players use (very) custom code.
ft triangle close color dist threshold:meters#Distance within which the "close" colors (see above) will be used.
ft triangle far color dist threshold:meters#Distance beyond which the "far" colors (see above) will be used. Between this threshold and the close threshold, colors are bilerped.
fireteam triangle texels/pixel#A "zoom" value on the fire team triangle texture.  Higher values will cause more texels to be used for each pixel (effectively zooming out from the texture).
active time#How long the minimap stays up after it is manually activated (after the user releases the activation button).
maximum simultaneous pings#how many of the top priority pings to display at a time.  e.g. if 1, only the highest priority ping will be visible at any given time.
new_camera_perspective_ping_duration:seconds#How long this ping should last.  -1.0 means it should last until the condition that is causing it has terminated (e.g. bomb disarmed).
new_camera_perspective_ping_priority#lower numbers = higher priority. 0.0 means ALWAYS show this ping regardless of priority or the limitation on ping count in the global ping configuration.
enemy_spotted_ping_duration:seconds#How long this ping should last.  -1.0 means it should last until the condition that is causing it has terminated (e.g. bomb disarmed).
enemy_spotted_ping_priority#lower numbers = higher priority. 0.0 means ALWAYS show this ping regardless of priority or the limitation on ping count in the global ping configuration.
radio_message_sent_ping_duration:seconds#How long this ping should last.  -1.0 means it should last until the condition that is causing it has terminated (e.g. bomb disarmed).
radio_message_sent_ping_priority#lower numbers = higher priority. 0.0 means ALWAYS show this ping regardless of priority or the limitation on ping count in the global ping configuration.
fire team triangle (close)#Color of fire team triangle fill verts that are <= the close distance threshold (see below).
fire team triangle (far)#Color of fire team triangle fill verts that are >= the far distance threshold (see below).
fire team triangle border (close)#Color of fire team triangle border-line verts that are <= the close distance threshold (see below).
fire team triangle border (far)#Color of fire team triangle border-line verts that are >= the far distance threshold (see below).
dir. damage pitch min{dir. damage height min}#domain of height function
dir. damage pitch max{dir. damage height max}#domain of height function
minimap world UL#World space upper left coordinates that will map to the hud space upper left (see below)
minimap world LR#World space lower right coordinates that will map to the hud space lower right (see below)
minimap hud UL#Hud space upper left coordinates upon which the world space upper left is mapped (see above)
minimap hud LR#Hud space lower right coordinates upon which the world space lower right is mapped (see above)
Backpack and equipment vertical offset
fields.definition:
Dual Wield - Offset used when wielding more than one weapon.
Single Wield - Offset used when NOT dual wielding and grenades are available.
None - Offset used when NOT dual wielding and grenades are NOT available (carrying support weapons, in a vehicle, etc).

fields.name:
fade start#distance from the center of the screen at which the fade starts
the edge of the screen is at about 0.55

fade stop#distance from the center of the screen at which the fade stops
the edge of the screen is at about 0.55
display string#comes out of the HUD text globals
max display time#how long the message can be on screen before being hidden
display count#how many times a training message will get displayed (0-3 only!)
dissapear delay#how long a displayed but untriggered message stays up
redisplay delay#how long after display this message will stay hidden
display delay (s)#how long the event can be triggered before it's displayed

options: weapon tracking#hiding these since they should be set in the weapon tracking data!
weapon locked#hiding these since they should be set in the weapon tracking data!
fireteam current target object{fireteam current target obert}
minimap_active_while_dead#draw minimap automatically whenever the player is dead
<scripted object> taken recent body damage{<scripted object> taken recent damage}
